prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Fixture installation, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: non-IC can in insulation contact. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 410.
title: Compliance check: Fixture installation (residential job)
